contracts.name: no_narration_to_memory
contracts.evidence: memory-policy.test.ts rejects narration/flavor/stock prose such as atmosphere-only observations.

contracts.name: source_backed_consequence_to_memory
contracts.evidence: memory-policy.test.ts accepts concrete source-backed events with event/authority anchors.

contracts.name: rumor_and_report_routes_survive
contracts.evidence: memory-policy.test.ts keeps reports and rumors in their own knowledge routes instead of upgrading them to truth.

contracts.name: false_claim_not_truth
contracts.evidence: knowledge-model.test.ts stores claims as claimed/belief lane with source provenance.

contracts.name: rollback_invalidates_future_knowledge
contracts.evidence: knowledge-model.test.ts verifies invalidateAuthorityAfterRestore filters records after restored world version.

knownLimits: Retrieval is structured/ref plus lexical for this wave; vector expansion remains optional and must stay source-id gated before it is enabled.
This wave does not run live provider gameplay; it closes deterministic backend contracts and focused regression coverage.
